title: Time Pays
description: A Minecraft mod tracking player online time (on servers) and giving out (configurable) rewards.
body:
A Minecraft mod tracking player online time and giving out (configurable) rewards.

It can give out rewards in form of Items, Commands, FSMM currency or FSMM money items.

V2 introduces "reward" groups, so specific rewards can be given only to specific player groups!

Example Images:    
![img1](https://fexcraft.net/files/mod_data/timepays/tpex0.png)
![img2](https://fexcraft.net/files/mod_data/timepays/tpex1.png)

Configuration info you can find in the Wiki.
If anything is still unclear, feel free to join the discord to ask for help.
